## Summary

## Why
Linked issue (`Fixes #123`), motivation, or design context.

## How
Brief overview of the approach. Anything tricky?

## Screenshots / GIF
Required for any visual change. Drop in before/after if applicable.

## Testing
- [ ] Loaded `index.html` locally
- [ ] Reset all `localStorage` keys (`castle*`) and ran a fresh game
- [ ] Tested at least one full run including a boss
- [ ] No new console errors
- [ ] Pixel-art style is consistent with the rest of the game

Anything you want extra eyes on?
